title: hulteniella integrifolia
intro: Hulteniella integrifolia, also known as Hulteniella, is a perennial plant species in the family Plantaginaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is known to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and relieving coughs, and is often used to treat other conditions such as fever and sore throats. Hulteniella integrifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for medicinal use.
